title: Dataset Manifest v2
description: Schema for dataset manifest (v2) - includes assembly config and input provenance

hash.description: SHA-256 hash of shard file (lowercase hex)

path.description: Relative or absolute path to shard file

records.description: Number of records in this shard

assemblyConfigHash.description: SHA-256 hash of canonical JSON for assembly parameters (shard size, filters, etc.)

datasetDigest.description: SHA-256 hash of canonical JSON combining assemblyConfigHash, input digests, and schema versions (stable dataset identity)

digest.description: SHA-256 hash: for receipts, use receipt.artifact.sha256 (or derived if available); for PGN files, compute from file content

path.description: Path to input (receipt path or PGN file path)

inputs.description: List of input sources (receipts or PGN files) used to build this dataset

shardSize.description: Maximum number of records per shard

maxGames.description: Maximum number of games to process (null = no limit)

maxPositions.description: Maximum number of positions to process (null = no limit)

startPly.description: Start processing from this ply number (inclusive, null = no lower bound)

endPly.description: Stop processing at this ply number (exclusive, null = no upper bound)

train.description: List of shard IDs assigned to training split

val.description: List of shard IDs assigned to validation split

frozenEval.description: List of shard IDs assigned to frozen evaluation split

filterConfigHash.description: Legacy filter config hash (kept for v1 compatibility, deprecated in v2)
